description: A hot favourite among the casually stylish, this adidas watch from the Originals collection ia a perfect digital wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. With excellent touches and grooved comfort, this watch makes for an excellent buy as a daily wear. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 10 mm Dial shape: Round Plastic case with a orange and black plastic strap and adidas logo for added durability, style, comfort Fixed bezel for added comfort Grooved strap and tang clasp for snug Fit and comfort wear, White digital dial displaying hours, minutes, seconds, date and day of the week Quartz movement of time display using a paper-thin piece of synthetic quartz to ensure accurate time measurement Solid stainless steel case back for enhanced durability 10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance at 100 meters, allowing you to use it even when snorkelling, skin-diving, and swimming Lap memory that allows the watch to record your laps
